---
title: "Player-Base Decay Forecasting for Live-Service Games"
subtitle: "Project report"
author: "Sumer Jaitly"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    pdf-engine: xelatex
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Summary of objective

The goal of this project is to build a model that can take as an input the historical average player-count numbers for a game and predict a player-base collapse within a fixed future time window.
